name: quote
description: Evaluate and improve quote/testimonial slides — dramatic outcome, authority voice, proof context
goal: Achieve consistent 12+/14 with quote slides that elevate the result above the quote and ground the testimony in context

prompts.text: Build a customer quote slide where the CIO says the platform delivered 300% ROI in 9 months
Build an operator quote slide where a plant manager says defects fell 42% after the transformation
Build a security testimonial slide where the CISO says incident response time dropped from 6 hours to 45 minutes
Build an employee quote slide where a hiring leader says time-to-hire fell from 45 days to 18 days
Build a customer quote slide where a client says NPS improved from 36 to 72 after launch
Build a board-level quote slide where the CFO says the cost program created $50M run-rate savings
Build a healthcare customer quote slide where the COO says wait times dropped 28% and satisfaction improved
Build a SaaS founder quote slide where churn fell by 3 points after adopting the analytics workflow
Build an integration quote slide where the integration lead says synergy capture accelerated by six months
Build an ESG quote slide where the sustainability chief says emissions dropped 40% without hurting growth
